Introduction xvii
sculpture, town-planning, water-divination, etc.1 The next section
treats of treatment of trees.2 The twelfth one expounds the manu-
facture of cements, perfumes, etc.3 The next one is connected with
the description of various animals, cows, dogs, etc.4 The next section,
relates to domestic felicity, erotic remedies, etc-5 The fifteenth
section describes gems and their values.6 The next topic dealt with is
the cleaning of teeth.7 The seventeenth section delineates in detail
various kinds of omens through birds and beasts.8 The last section
is devoted to the functions ofasterisms, lunar days, etc.9
Our author is Samdsoktipriya (fond of brevity) and Mahdgranlha-
bhiru (afraid of too much elaboration), according to his worthy
